race.comment: GHOST WALKER (4) continued his excellent recent form with a game second in open company over this distance at Port Macquarie last time out. That run followed a 45-day reset so he should exhibit some improvement here. One of the key contenders. SUPREME COMMAND (1) led all the way for a well-deserved win a fortnight ago at Port Macquarie, defeating GHOST WALKER. Goes up 5kgs which is a worry but he loves heavy tracks and is in a rich vein of form. ZOU BIG BOY (10) is a free roller who is racing well but is without a win for 13 months. Each-way chance down in the weights. BONFIDELITY (7) returned to winning form last time when she scored by a nose over 1600m at Inverell. Rates a chance in this field.
